caption: A man with a white beard, wearing a white kurta, a colorful scarf, and a red cap, speaks into a microphone during a public gathering. He is positioned in front of a backdrop featuring repeated white lotus logos. Around him, a crowd of people is visible, many wearing red caps and saffron scarves. The scene is overlaid with a graphic border containing the text "भारतीय जनता पार्टी स्थापना दिवस" and "प्रजनमंजरी" and "दिल्ली". Social media handles including "BJP4India" and the website "www.bjp.org/bjplive" are displayed at the bottom, alongside the phrase "लाइव देखें". Throughout the sequence, the man remains the central focus, gesturing with his hand as he speaks, while the surrounding crowd remains relatively static. The visual presentation remains consistent across the frames, maintaining the same graphic overlays and setting.
